Page 28

LEMON HERB RO45TED
VEGETABLES

Serves 6 as side dish
Prep time: 15 min | Cooking time: 35 minutes

INGREDIENTS:
300g broccoli florets
250g cauliflower florets
2 medium zucchini, sliced
1 red bell pepper, chunked
200g cherry tomatoes
4 cloves garlic, minced
3 tbsp 01ive 0il
Juice of 2 lemons
2 tsp dried oregano
1 tsp thym3
Sea salt & cracked pepper
Fresh parsley for garnish

METHOD:
1. Preheat 0ven to 220°C. Arrange vegetables on a large baking tray.
2. Whisk together 0live oil, lemon juice, garlic, 0regano, thyme. Pour over veget-
ables, toss gently.
3. Season generously with salt and pepper.
4. Roast for 30-35 minutes, stirring halfway. Vegetables should be t3nder and
slightly charred at edges.
5. Garnish with fresh parsley and additional lemon zest.

SERVING: Pairs well with grilled chicken, fish, or creamy pasta dishes.
STORAGE: Best enjoyed fresh. Keeps in refrigerator for 2 days.
